subcodes.first_line: I praise and thank the Glorious Lord, the Benevolent, the Compassionate, the Beautiful, the Bountiful in His gifts, the Mighty in His grace, for that which [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: احمد و اشکر الرب الجلیل البر الروف الجمیل جزیل العطاء عظیم الولاء علی ما
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for firmness in the Covenant, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @praise and encouragement, @power; greatness; centrality of the Covenant, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities
